notes: OWN one-click LST leverage loop on Navi (flash-loan variant of the haSUI loop from doc 05 — own history has no haSUI loop; this is the identical pattern with Volo vSUI/CERT). Single PTB: flash-loan 163.968 SUI (PoolWithdraw idx 3 + FlashLoan idx 4) -> merge with ~125 own SUI -> stake 288.968 SUI to Volo (native_pool::StakedEvent idx 8, 274.506529332 vSUI out) -> deposit vSUI to Navi reserve 5 (lending::DepositEvent idx 11) -> borrow 164.657255884 SUI reserve 0 (BorrowEvent idx 14) -> flash-repay 164.164761600 = principal + 0.1967616 SUI fee (FlashRepay idx 17). Labels: LST mint = swap:trade (SUI->vSUI disposal; policy to confirm in [1C.4]); all three events flagged looping_pattern + flash_loan; FlashLoan/FlashRepay themselves emit no TaxEvent (flag-only per doc 05), flash fee noted here.
